headline: JPMorgan's Connect Coach cuts time to source advisor discussion materials by 90% — Harvard Business School calls it 'an entirely different game'
the_so_what: A 90% reduction in the time advisors spend sourcing client discussion materials is not incremental — it rewrites how much time a wealth advisor spends in front of clients versus behind a screen.
company_name: JPMorgan Private Bank and Wealth Management
source_name: JPMorgan Chase 2025 Investor Day — Asset & Wealth Management
summary: At JPMorgan Chase's 2025 Investor Day on May 20, the Asset & Wealth Management division disclosed three live AI deployments across advisors, investors, and operations. Connect Coach — deployed for wealth advisors — delivers tailored outreach ideas, meeting prep and next steps, real-time market insights, and on-demand answers, cutting the time needed to source client discussion materials by 90%. Smart Monitor (Spectrum), deployed for investors, reduces time spent researching a topic by 83% through AI-integrated workflows, automated insights, and custom universes. A third tool, Guidelines, improves operational productivity by 50% through automated coding, alert management, and restriction analysis. Harvard Business School, which produced a case study on JPMorgan's AI programme, said: "We've looked at AI across many industries — JPMorgan is playing an entirely different game."

key_stat.label: Reduction in time to source advisor discussion materials — JPMorgan Connect Coach (2025 Investor Day)

verified_claims: Connect Coach deployed for advisors — tailored outreach ideas, meeting prep & next steps, real-time market insights, answers from experts (Investor Day slide 11)
90% reduction in time to source discussion materials — Connect Coach (Investor Day slide 11)

Harvard Business School case study on JPMorgan AI — 'playing an entirely different game' (Investor Day slide 11)
_governance.notes: All claims sourced directly from JPMorgan 2025 Investor Day Asset & Wealth Management presentation, slide 11 (page 11/21). Source PDF verified by Haresh against the actual document. human_approved: Track 2 entry, claims confirmed directly from source slide.
